title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Indifi Technologies Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Indifi Technologies Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the Indifi Technologies Holdings Services family as a Frontend Developer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Indifi Technologies Holdings Services:
Indifi Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indifi Technologies Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
